display_text: Book of the Dead, Tier 5: Neutral item with a powerful summoning active. Summons 2 demonic warriors and 2 demonic archers for 65 seconds. The warrior applies mana burn on hit, reveals invisible units, and deals high magical damage upon death, while the archer provides a basic dispel with slow and grants a movement speed aura to nearby units. Stats: CD: 80s, Duration: 65s.
